form.formComment: Resuming after a 15 months break. Not seen since he finished last of 14 at Sha Tin Rating 60 December 22 2024 over 1400m, 22 len behind Ka Ying Attack carrying 57.5kg at $18. On debut sixth of 14 at Sha Tin Rating 60 November 9 2024 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Ka Ying Attack with 59kg at $45. HK recruit who strode out nicely to win last couple of jumpouts, so expecting a good showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Resuming after a 15 months break. Not seen since he finished last of 14 at Sha Tin Rating 60 December 22 2024 over 1400m, 22 len behind Ka Ying Attack carrying 57.5kg at $18. On debut sixth of 14 at Sha Tin Rating 60 November 9 2024 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Ka Ying Attack with 59kg at $45. HK recruit who strode out nicely to win last couple of jumpouts, so expecting a good showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped only fairly. Near the 150m, bumped by The Boom Box.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after 11 months 4th of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1200m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Benriach with 59.5kg at $31. Previously second-up eased back early on 8th of 10 at Kerang Mdn-Sw on April 19 over 1400m, 5 len behind Eyes Wide Shut with 59.5kg at $3.60. Will come on from that run and is well-placed to play a role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Second run back. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages.
Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 11 at Mt Gambier 2yo+ Mdn Hcp on March 22 over 900m, 2 len behind Whathappensinvegas with 57.5kg at $13. The start before that couldn't go on with it; 6th of 8 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1000m, 7 len behind Crickwood carrying 59.5kg at $13. Far from disgraced of late, but hasn't been able to get the job done in easier races than this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Most recently 5th of 11 at Mt Gambier 2yo+ Mdn Hcp on March 22 over 900m, 2 len behind Whathappensinvegas with 57.5kg at $13. The start before that couldn't go on with it; 6th of 8 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1000m, 7 len behind Crickwood carrying 59.5kg at $13. Far from disgraced of late, but hasn't been able to get the job done in easier races than this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three-wide and without cover throughout the event.

form.formComment: Resuming off four-and-a-half months break after having had one race start. At debut last start 4th of 7 at Traralgon 3yo Mdn-Sw on November 30 over 1100m, on heavy track; 4.5 len behind Dirty Diana carrying 58kg at $2.80. Had four recent trials to get fit for this. Last trial runner-up in a Cranbourne jump-out on March 30. Did strike a Heavy track on debut and has placed in two jumpouts since.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Resuming off four-and-a-half months break after having had one race start. Last trial runner-up in a Cranbourne jump-out on March 30. Did strike a Heavy track on debut and has placed in two jumpouts since.

form.formComment: Gelding by Capitalist on debut. Runner-up in a Cranbourne jump-out on March 23. Did place at latest jumpout.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Capitalist on debut. Runner-up in a Cranbourne jump-out on March 23. Did place at latest jumpout.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start ran last of 14 at Ballarat 3yo Mdn-Sw on September 19 over 1000m, 6 len behind Tres Magnifique carrying 58kg at $14. Went for a break before returning second last of 11 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 1200m, 12 len behind Ten Warriors with 59kg at $26. Has won a jumpout since the poor last-start showing, but must improve sharply to trouble these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Third race start. First start ran last of 14 at Ballarat 3yo Mdn-Sw on September 19 over 1000m, 6 len behind Tres Magnifique carrying 58kg at $14. Went for a break before returning second last of 11 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 1200m, 12 len behind Ten Warriors with 59kg at $26. Has won a jumpout since the poor last-start showing, but must improve sharply to trouble these.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Raced four-wide without cover.
Began awkwardly, then bumped and carried outwards by Tres Magnifique.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 8 at Colac Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 1000m, slow going 2.25 len behind The Last King with 59kg at $4.40. Second run from a spell led to the turn then faded ran last of 11 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1112m, 14 len behind Conflict carrying 59kg at $10. Should measure up.

form.formComment: Gelding by Siyouni making his first appearance. Runner-up in a Werribee jump-out on March 27. Showed some good dash in latest two jumpouts so might give a sight.

form.formComment: Most recently 8th of 12 at Tocumwal Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Zar Zar carrying 54kg at $17. The run before that ran last of 11 at Kyneton F&M Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1108m, slow going 7 len behind Finchaven carrying 58kg at $101. Needs to improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Eased from a wide barrier and settled at the rear of the field.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when 3rd of 9 at Sandown-Hillside Mdn-Sw on January 21 over 1000m, 3 len behind Fast 'N' Inzaine carrying 57.5kg at $2.90. Good on debut, was well-held by Bear Champ in recent trial but does have the inside alley.

form.formComment: Jumped at big odds at debut, ran last of 7 at Cranbourne Mdn-Sw on February 13 over 1000m, 18 len behind Headbanger with 57kg at $41. Doubt she will trouble these.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Jumped at big odds at debut, ran last of 7 at Cranbourne Mdn-Sw on February 13 over 1000m, 18 len behind Headbanger with 57kg at $41. Doubt she will trouble these.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly making debut by Star Witness out of Sweet Hannaford. Runner-up in a Mornington jump-out on March 4. Following that ran 3rd in a Sandown-Hillside jump-out on March 18. Wide barrier to overcome. Placed at last two jumpouts, but ridden out in both and prefer to see from the wide gate

form.formComment: Filly by Exceed And Excel on debut. Won a jump-out at Avoca on March 31. Jumpouts have shown she's got plenty of speed, which could help overcome the wide gate.

form.formComment: Last start raced on the pace before fading ran last of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, slow going 12 len behind Two To Tango with 57kg at $3.10. The start before that 3rd of 7 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw on March 4 over 1000m, head behind Absolute Power carrying 57kg at $2.20. Rates highly here and can bounce back.
